grant_title: University of Vermont Cancer Center Pilot Project - Calendar Year 2026
geographic_restrictions: University of Vermont Cancer Center members (primarily Vermont-based)
project_area: Cancer-related research projects, postdoctoral research, and career development
demographic_requirements: Must be a project not supported by existing extra- or intra-mural grant funding; no Cancer Center pilot grant funding within the past two years
eligibility_summary: Open to UVM Cancer Center members (Full, Associate, Core Clinical, or Clinical) with projects not already funded by other grants and no prior pilot grant funding in the last two years. Projects must aim to generate preliminary data for future extramural funding or publications.
